title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers presents five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, Graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails via Python hooks, and runtime steering for self-correction. The approach prioritizes token efficiency, accuracy, and failure detection before user exposure.
